page_metadata.biotools__summary: Eye-tracking data must be transformed into fixations and saccades before it can be analyzed. This package provides a non-parametric speed-based approach to do this on a trial basis. The method is especially useful when there are large differences in data quality, as the thresholds are adjusted accordingly.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Eye-tracking data must be transformed into fixations and saccades before it can be analyzed. The method is especially useful when there are large differences in data quality, as the thresholds are adjusted accordingly.
